Immunocompromised: [immunocompromised_context]. [Relevant negatives reviewed]. [Additional context].

clinical_blockers: Children, pregnancy, neck stiffness, broad “temperature” matching, hydration assessment, and the history draft containing neck-stiffness text remain unsupported.
Supportive care, hydration advice, antipyretics, antibiotics, and fixed follow-up remain unsupported and clinician-led.
